description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The front facade features a combination of large windows, a balcony with a glass railing, and a recessed entryway with a wooden door. The ground floor includes a garage with a sectional door and a small covered porch area. The rear of the house opens to a spacious, enclosed yard with floor-to-ceiling windows providing ample natural light. The exterior is finished in neutral tones, with accents of wood and metal, and the roof includes a raised utility section. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a spacious rear yard, featuring clean lines and neutral finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entryway with a wooden door, balcony, and a mix of large and small windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall, garage extension, and a green yard area at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large enclosed yard, floor-to-ceiling windows, and a simple, open balcony.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single window, the green yard, and the covered porch area visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and balcony access
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a wooden door, small covered porch, and adjacent garage door
